summary: Completed all scaffolding steps. Created minimal pyproject.toml prerequisite, then TDD'd: directory structure (12 dirs, 8 __init__.py files, 4 .gitkeep), pyproject.toml with all 19 PRD runtime deps + 3 dev deps + tool configs, config.yaml with all PRD sections and exact default values, and .gitignore with output/ and Python patterns. All 15 tests pass.

Completed all 9 plan items (1 prerequisite + 8 TDD steps) in a single iteration. Created directory structure (autopilot/prompts/ with .gitkeep, tests/ with conftest.py). Wrote 4 failing test files then 4 prompt template implementations: activity_label.md (Stage 2, Claude Sonnet), narrative_planner.md (Stage 3, Claude Opus, 6 creator placeholders), script_writer.md (Stage 4, Claude Opus), edit_planner.md (Stage 5, Claude Opus, 8 tool-use schemas). All 46 tests pass.

Completed all 18 steps + 1 prerequisite for SQLite catalog and db interface. TDD'd CatalogDB class with: connection management (WAL mode, thread safety, context manager), 12-table schema from PRD, CRUD helpers for all tables (media_files, transcripts, shot_boundaries, detections, face_clusters, clip_embeddings, audio_events, activity_clusters, narratives, edit_plans, crop_paths, uploads), performance indexes, integration tests (transaction commit/rollback, FK enforcement, batch performance, JSON1). All 57 tests pass, ruff lint/format clean, pyright 0 errors.

Completed all 6 review fix steps (19-24). TDD'd: (1) transaction semantics — removed self.conn.commit() from all 16 CRUD write methods so context manager is sole commit point, updated conftest fixture to use isolation_level=None for test convenience; (2) resource leak — wrapped __init__ post-connect setup in try/except to close connection on failure; (3) rewrote flawed TestIntegration transaction tests to properly exercise commit/rollback paths. All 63 tests pass, ruff clean, pyright 0 errors. All plan steps (1-24 + pre-1) now complete.

Completed all 25 plan items (1 prerequisite + 24 TDD steps) for the ingest pipeline. Created 3 modules: scanner.py (MediaFile dataclass, scan_directory with ProcessPoolExecutor parallelism, _run_ffprobe/_run_exiftool metadata extraction, probe_file combiner), normalizer.py (EBU R128 loudnorm via ffmpeg with skip logic), dedup.py (SHA-256 first-64MB hashing, find_duplicates via GROUP BY query, mark_duplicates status update). Updated __init__.py with full public API exports. All 169 tests pass (42 new ingest tests), ruff clean, pyright 0 errors.

Removed unused imports (pytest, MagicMock, call, patch) and unused variable assignment (mock_run) across three ingest test files. Fixed import block formatting in test_ingest_scanner.py. All ruff lint checks now pass.

Completed all 6 post-review fix steps (25-30). TDD'd three fixes: (1) scanner fault isolation — refactored scan_directory from executor.map to executor.submit+as_completed with per-future try/except so probe failures only skip the failing file; (2) dedup deterministic ordering — added ORDER BY rowid subquery in find_duplicates GROUP_CONCAT; (3) normalizer collision prevention — added root_dir parameter to normalize_audio that mirrors input directory structure under output_dir. All 50 ingest tests pass, ruff clean. All plan steps (pre-1 through step-30) now complete.

Completed all 33 plan items (1 prerequisite + 32 TDD steps) for the CLI entry point and pipeline orchestrator. Created 2 modules: orchestrator.py (StageDefinition/StageResult dataclasses, StageStatus enum, PipelineOrchestrator with 9-stage DAG, Kahn's algorithm topological sort, run() with progress reporting/error handling/dry-run/budget tracking), cli.py (Click group with --config, 7 subcommands with --input-dir/--output-dir/--verbose/--dry-run, _setup_context helper for config loading and DB opening, stage delegation, error handling). Added [project.scripts] entry point. All 291 tests pass (52 new), ruff clean.

Completed final 2 post-review fix steps (33-34). TDD'd output directory auto-creation: added 3 tests verifying _setup_context creates missing output_dir (including deeply nested paths), creates catalog.db in the new dir, and doesn't clobber existing directories. Fix: added config.output_dir.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True) before CatalogDB instantiation. All 55 CLI+orchestrator tests pass. All plan steps now complete.
